headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Camden Prop Trust, Lowers Price Target to $113
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $115 to $113.
